title: Callista heteroidea
taxonomy: Callista heteroidea is a species of sea snail, specifically a marine gastropod mollusk belonging to the family Veneridae. It is a type of clam or a saltwater clam. The classification of Callista heteroidea includes the kingdom Animalia, phylum Mollusca, class Bivalvia, order Veneroida, and family Veneridae. This classification reflects its physical characteristics and biological features. Callista heteroidea is also known by its synonym, Venerupis rhomboides.
